entries.summary: Phase 6 complete — test fixtures (word-sample.txt/clean.txt) created, charmap fixes (full-width ASCII, \u2011, fixture space), sanitizer.test.js fixture test added, smoke.test.js created with IPC/security/performance tests. Multiple fix iterations for charmap (full-width codepoints, \u2011), fixtures (space handling), smoke test (IPC verification via source reading, network blocker regex). Total test count: 131 sanitizer tests + 12 smoke tests.
lessons_learned: Full-width ASCII uppercase E is \uFF25, not \uFF29 (which is I) — test_engineer correctly caught this
CHARMAP entries must handle full-width ASCII A-Z and a-z explicitly because NFKC doesn't normalize case correctly for some codepoints
Regular space (U+0020) before a fraction is NOT consumed by CHARMAP — only NBSP (U+00A0) is converted to space; fixture input must not have regular space before fraction
Network blocker regex in smoke test had extra colon — \:\/\/ matched wrong pattern
Smoke tests for Electron behaviors (app launch, clipboard IPC) require a display environment — static source verification is the best we can do in headless
